title: Vox Dei JSON-line dispatch request
description: One JSON object per line on stdin/stdout (`id`, `method`, `params`), matching `vox_cli::dispatch_protocol::DispatchRequest` and `vox_mcp::dei_ipc` wire shape.

id.description: Correlation id for the request/response pair.

params.description: Method-specific params payload. Strong per-method schemas are defined in downstream daemon contracts.
